name: akshit-demo-web-shop-capstone
description: Playwright JavaScript automation capstone for Demo Web Shop.

scripts.clean:reports: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const p of ['allure-results','allure-report','playwright-report','test-results']) fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true})"
scripts.test:allure: npm run clean:reports && cross-env ALLURE=true playwright test && npm run allure:generate
